  • Overview

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActionBarView
    Renders the action bar buttons for skills and help/reset actions.
    BoardView
    Renders the board grid and plays placement and line clear animations.
    CellType
    Enumerates the possible contents of a board cell.
    DisruptAction
    Skill action that removes an opponent piece at a fixed energy cost.
    DoublePlaceAction
    Skill action that places two non-adjacent pieces for an energy cost.
    FrozenRuleService
    Applies the frozen piece rule by tracking inactivity and freezing or thawing pieces.
    GameApplication
    JavaFX application that wires the UI, audio, and game events together.
    GameEngine
    Core game rules engine that executes turns, scoring, and skill usage.
    GameEventListener
    Listener interface for gameplay events surfaced to UI or other observers.
    GameState
    Mutable container for board, player, and turn state.
    GameUiController
    UI controller that routes input to the game engine and forwards events.
    HudView
    Heads-up display for game status, scores, energy, and legends.
    Line
    Represents a four-in-a-row line of board positions.
    LineDetector
    Utility for detecting and resolving four-in-a-row lines on the board.
    Main
    Application entry point that launches the JavaFX game UI.
    MoveAction
    Skill action that moves one of the current player's pieces to an empty cell.
    OverheatRuleService
    Tracks overheat counters and applies energy penalties for hoarding.
    PlayerId
    Identifies a player and provides access to the opponent.
    PlayerState
    Tracks score, energy, and turn modifiers for a single player.
    Position
    Immutable board coordinate (row, col).
    SealAction
    Skill action that seals an empty cell for one opponent placement.
    SealLifecycleService
    Handles seal expiration after opponent placements.
    SkillAction
    Contract for validating and applying a skill action to the game state.
    SkillMode
    UI input modes for standard placement and skill usage.
